_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.PDF.Activities Extract PDF Page Range activity faults with UiPath.DocumentProcessing.Contracts.Extensions.InvalidPageRangeException 'The input string '''abc''' was not in a correct format.' because the configured Range is malformed. The agent must read the invalid page-range signature as the cause (the Range argument), not blame the PDF content, a missing file, or a workflow-logic bug. Signature captured verbatim from a local UiPath.PDF.Activities 4.3.0 run; workflow name scrubbed. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the InvalidPageRangeException signature from the Info / Error log.
